description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6.5 Docker image, runs a before_script that prints the Python version, installs pipenv, and installs development dependencies, and caches the .pipcache, .pipenvcache and .venv directories (untracked). Define variables GIT_STRATEGY=fetch, PIPENV_CACHE_DIR, PIPENV_VENV_IN_PROJECT=true and PIP_CACHE_DIR, and four stages: Unit tests & Coverage, Coverage Reporting, Linting, and Package & Release. In the Unit tests & Coverage stage add a "unit testing and coverage" job that runs pipenv run py.test --cov=cli -vv tests -s --cov-report html --cov-report term, publishes the htmlcov directory as an artifact (expire in 1 day) and extracts coverage with the given regex, and runs on all branches except master. In the Linting stage add a "linting" job that runs pipenv run pylint cli tests, pipenv run pycodestyle cli tests and pipenv run pydocstyle cli tests, and also runs on all branches except master. In the Coverage Reporting stage add a "pages" job that depends on the unit testing job, creates a public/coverage folder, copies htmlcov/* into it, and publishes the public directory as an artifact, running on all branches except master. Finally, in the Package & Release stage add a "package and release" job that runs pipenv run python setup.py bdist_wheel, stores the dist directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
